final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input ce,
    input [31:0] din0,
    input [31:0] din1,
    output reg [31:0] dout
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            dout <= 0;
        end else if (ce) begin
            dout <= din0 * din1;
        end
    end
endmodule
